## Overview

FUSION CLI — OpenRouter's free multi-model deliberation.
Fusion turns your prompt into a small multi-model deliberation.
$0/million tokens, 1M context window.

Usage:
  fusion "your prompt"              Single query
  fusion chat                       Interactive chat
  fusion models

| `cmd_query(prompt: str, args)` | Single-shot query. |
| `cmd_chat(args)` | Interactive chat loop. |
| `cmd_compare(prompt: str, args)` | Compare Fusion against a standard model. |
| `cmd_models(args)` | List available free models. |
